body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR replaces the Jacobi preconditioned stationary iterative solver for diffusion with a lower triangular solver. Using a simpler solver will hopefully improve both performance and stability.

title: Improve implicit diffusion solver

body: This PR fixes a bug in the implicit diffusion solver for simulations without moisture. We currently don't have any examples of this setup, but we will once we set `implicit_diffusion = true` by default.
title: Fix bug in implicit diffusion without moisture

-->

- Removes `Float32` in some longrun configs as that is the default.
